components.name: Button
components.summary: Triggers an action in response to user interaction.

args.name: text
args.description: Visible label text for the button.

blocks.name: default
blocks.description: Optional custom content rendered inside the button.

a11yNotes: Provide an accessible label for icon-only content.
Use disabled state to prevent unavailable actions.

components.name: Alert
components.summary: Highlights important status information to the user.
a11yNotes: Use concise text and avoid relying on color alone.
